title: Sakana Fugu vs Fusion (Beats Fable 5?)
summary: Julian Goldie compares Sakana's Fugu (Ultra and Mini) with OpenRouter Fusion via side-by-side tests on visual and code generation tasks. Fugu Ultra ranks first for quality, Fusion second, and Fugu Mini third, though Fugu offers cheaper flat pricing with daily caps while Fusion charges per token with easier API access.
writeup: The video runs side-by-side tests of Sakana's Fugu (Ultra and Mini) against OpenRouter Fusion on visual and code generation tasks. On quality, Fugu Ultra ranks first, Fusion second, and Fugu Mini third. The pricing contrast matters for buyers: Fugu uses cheaper flat pricing with daily caps, while Fusion charges per token and offers easier API access.
